name: MentorAI — API Health Check
description: Tests the /api/mentor/ask endpoint across all three domains (business, tech, career) and verifies that: (1) responses return HTTP 200, (2) the response body includes 'content', 'confidence', 'modeUsed', 'conceptMap', and 'adviceCard', (3) confidence is a number between 50 and 100, (4) conceptMap has at least 4 nodes. Run this after every deploy to confirm the primary Gemini path is healthy.
